common.try_again: Try changing your location or check your connection.

tracking.title: Live Tracking
tracking.desc: Real-time oversight of public development works near you.

details.about: Live tracking allows you to monitor the progress of public infrastructure projects in real-time. By leveraging geofencing and IoT data, we bring you the latest on what's happening on the ground.

steps.title: Find Projects
steps.desc: Browse the map or list to find projects in your neighborhood.

steps.title: Monitor Updates
steps.desc: See real-time progress percentages, latest photos, and timeline updates.

steps.title: Stay Informed
steps.desc: Receive notifications when a project near you reaches a major milestone.

benefits.title: Transparency
benefits.desc: Hold authorities accountable through visible, trackable progress.

benefits.title: Safety
benefits.desc: Know about road closures or construction hazards before you head out.

navigation.title: Indoor Nav
navigation.desc: Smart assistance for navigating complex public buildings.

details.about: Indoor navigation solves the complexity of large public buildings like hospitals, municipal offices, and transit hubs. Get turn-by-step guidance right to the room or counter you need.

steps.title: Select Destination
steps.desc: Search for specific rooms, departments, or amenities within the building.

steps.title: Follow Guidance
steps.desc: Follow precise, step-by-step visual and haptic cues on your phone.

steps.title: Smart Paths
steps.desc: Use Smart Assist to generate the most efficient route based on your specific needs.

benefits.title: Time Saving
benefits.desc: Never get lost again in sprawling corridors or complex floor plans.

benefits.title: Accessibility
benefits.desc: Routes optimized for elevators, ramps, and accessible entrances.

feedback.title: Civic Feedback
feedback.desc: Report issues directly with AI-powered verification.

details.about: Civic feedback is your voice in the community. Report issues like potholes, broken lights, or construction delays, and track them until they are resolved.

steps.title: Spot an Issue
steps.desc: Take a photo of the problem and describe what needs attention.

steps.title: AI Verification
steps.desc: Our AI checks the photo for authenticity to ensure fast and valid reporting.

steps.title: Track Resolution
steps.desc: Follow your report's status from 'Pending' to 'Resolved' in real-time.

benefits.title: Verified Reports
benefits.desc: AI ensures only genuine issues are reported, speeding up government action.

benefits.title: Impact Points
benefits.desc: Earn civic points for every successfully resolved issue you report.

impact.title: Your Impact
impact.desc: Earn badges and points for your community contributions.

details.about: Your Impact celebrates your commitment to the community. Every action you take—from reporting an issue to checking on a project—contributes to a better city.

steps.title: Contribute Daily
steps.desc: Engage with projects, provide feedback, and verify completed works.

steps.title: Earn Points
steps.desc: Accumulate civic points for every positive action you take in the app.

steps.title: Level Up
steps.desc: Unlock exclusive badges and titles as you transition from a 'Newcomer' to a 'City Guardian'.

benefits.title: Recognition
benefits.desc: Be recognized as a leading voice in your local community.

benefits.title: Community Growth
benefits.desc: See how your individual contributions add up to collective change.

activity.title: Your Impact
activity.subtitle: Track your civic contributions
activity.start_contributing: Start contributing by reporting issues or providing feedback

project.no_news: No live news articles found for this project recently.

help.title: Help Center
help.immediate_desc: Our support team is available 24/7 to assist you.
help.no_results: No FAQs found for your search.
help.contact_desc: Have a question or feedback? Send us a message.
help.report_desc: Something not working? Let us know.
help.msg_sent_desc: We've received your message and will get back to you shortly.
help.report_submitted_desc: Thank you for reporting this issue.
help.missing_info_desc: Please select a category and provide a description.

questions.a: Use OTP or Google Sign-In from the login screen. If you're a first-time user, you can also continue as a guest to explore the app.

questions.q: Can I use the app without an account?
questions.a: Yes, you can use the 'Continue as Guest' option on the login screen. However, you'll need an account to report issues or give feedback.
DishaSetu is a civic transparency platform that helps citizens track public development projects in real-time using geo-intelligence.

questions.q: What do the project status labels mean?
questions.a: Projects can be 'Ongoing', 'Completed', or 'Delayed'. 'Delayed' means the project is behind its official schedule.

questions.q: How do I report an issue?
questions.a: Go to any project's details page and tap on 'Report an Issue'. You can then provide details, select a category, and upload photos.
When you are near a listed project site, the app will send you a notification with brief details about that project.

feedback.title: Report an Issue
feedback.success_msg: Your report has been submitted successfully. We'll track this and notify you of updates.
feedback.save_id: Save this ID to track your report
feedback.ai_detected: AI-generated image detected. Please upload a real photo.

profile.title: Profile
profile.no_reports_msg: Report a civic issue and make your voice heard.
profile.impact_desc: Your reports drive real civic change.
profile.impact_start_desc: File your first report to begin.
